message:
feat(tools): add LLM module, FTS sanitization, subject truncation

- LLM integration (llm.rs): env bridge, model selection (7 providers),
  completion client using asupersync HttpClient, safe JSON extraction
  (3-strategy fallback), thread summary merge logic, wired into
  summarize_thread (single + multi-thread modes). 20 tests.

- FTS query sanitization (queries.rs): sanitize_fts_query(),
  quote_hyphenated_tokens(), extract_like_terms(), like_escape(),
  run_like_fallback() with LIKE fallback on FTS5 failure. 20 tests.

- Subject truncation at 200 chars in send_message and reply_message,
  case-insensitive prefix check in reply_message.

333 tests passing, 0 failures, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
